title: Cuneiform Tablet #0307: Neo-Assyrian Medical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a medical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a medical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Medical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records medical matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
